Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10084 0 0}Dude... That movie was friggin' terrible...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}Was that supposed to be a comedy or something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}Just so you know, I really do have a girlfriend. It's not like we never hang out or anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Emiri just always wants me to go to her house...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I really want to take her out to dinner somewhere or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10092 0 0}Hmm... Maybe it's because of that Apathy Syndrome thing that's going around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe she's scared of catching it... Is it contagious?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10075 0 0}Seriously!? Dude, what are we even doing here, then!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 10 25 25}We gotta stay inside or we could catch it! Damn, that's scary to think about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika seems very worried...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10021 0 0}{f 5 13 2 30 101}Oh, good. So, if I let her know, then she'll probably let me take her out somewhere, right...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika seems relieved...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10072 0 0}{f 5 13 2 15 101}Yeah, I guess you wouldn't know either. Nobody really knows that much about it, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 0 25 25}I can't really blame Emiri for being worried...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika looks a little grim...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10054 0 0}If we go out on a date, it should be somewhere with less people around, just in case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll get a magazine to find some places like that. Mind if we stop at a bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After the bookstore, I decided[n]to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
